title: Sweet Crunchy Argentinian Almond Crumble
description: A kid-friendly dessert featuring sweet and crunchy almonds that are perfect for a quick snack or dessert.
instructions: Gather all ingredients and cut almonds into small pieces.
In a mixing bowl, combine almond pieces, sweetener, butter, and honey. Mix well until mixture is crumbly.
Line a baking sheet with parchment paper or a silicone mat.
Press the almond mixture evenly onto the prepared baking sheet to form a flat layer approximately 1/4 inch thick.
Bake for about 25-30 minutes or until almonds are golden brown and crispy.
Remove from oven and let cool slightly before serving. Store leftovers in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 3 days.
Enjoy your sweet, crunchy Argentinian Almond Crumble as a snack or dessert!
